REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION, 501, PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT ENTERED INTO THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WHILE BEING REPRESENTED BY COUNSEL WHO "HAS FULLY EXPLAINED TO HIS CLIENT THE LEGAL EFFECT OF THIS AGREEMENT AND OF THE RELEASE AND DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AND THAT THE SETTLEMENT AND COMPROMISE STATED HERE IS FINAL AND CONCLUSIVE FORTHWITH." DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN THAT SHE UNDERSTOOD WHAT WAS REQUIRED OF HER UNDER THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT (I.E. PAYMENT OF MONEY IN EXCHANGE FOR DISMISSAL AND RELEASE) BY STATING "I HOPE YOU KNOW YOU JUST STOLE A BUNCH OF MONEY." DEFENDANT BREACHED THE AGREEMENT BY FAILING TO MAKE THE PAYMENTS AS REQUIRED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Jun-30-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF FAIR EMPLOYMENT AND HOUSING's Motion To Enforce Settlement is GRANTED. Defendant entered into the Settlement Agreement while being represented by counsel who "has fully explained to his client the legal effect of this agreement and of the Release and Dismissal with Prejudice and that the settlement and compromise stated here is final and conclusive forthwith." Defendant has shown that she understood what was required of her under the settlement agreement (i.e. payment of money in exchange for dismissal and release) by stating "I hope you know you just stole a bunch of money." Defendant breached the agreement by failing to make the payments as required. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
